# PHIL.033 ? Samkhya

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** samkhya
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Dualism of consciousness (purusha) and matter (prakriti); evolution of world from prakriti; liberation through discrimination; enumeration of categories

## Application
Distinguish consciousness from material processes; recognize evolutionary unfolding; achieve liberation through discrimination; systematic categorization

## Key Values
- Consciousness-matter distinction
- Evolution
- Discriminative knowledge
- Systematic analysis
